# UC-14.10.12 · Aranet Continuous Environmental Evidence for Cold Storage Compliance

## Description

Regulated cold chains require continuous monitoring evidence; Aranet sensors provide timestamped proof of remain-in-range.

## Value

Supports GDP/GMP conversations with auditors and reduces manual clipboard checks.

## Implementation

(1) Validate calibration certificates. (2) Map thresholds to SKU requirements. (3) Immutable storage or export for QA.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-24h
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(temp_c, ""))
| where match(lower(coalesce(location, zone, "")), "(?i)cold|chill|reefer")
| eval breach=if(temp>5 OR temp<-30,1,0)
| stats sum(breach) as breach_events count as samples min(temp) as min_c max(temp) as max_c by location
```

## Visualization

Compliance timeline; excursion table.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
